name: Cesium Globe
description: Scene-wide Cesium globe and terrain renderer. Mounts a lazy-loaded Cesium viewer behind the Three.js canvas so scenes can opt into streamed globe terrain only when needed.
author: stemstudio

useWorldTerrain.name: Use World Terrain
useWorldTerrain.description: Enable Cesium World Terrain. This usually requires a valid Cesium Ion access token.

apiKey.name: Ion Access Token
apiKey.description: Optional Cesium Ion access token used for Cesium-hosted terrain and imagery.

imagerySource.name: Imagery Source
imagerySource.description: Base imagery shown by Cesium. Ion imagery uses Cesium defaults; OSM works without an Ion token.

imageryUrl.name: Imagery URL
imageryUrl.description: OpenStreetMap-compatible tile endpoint for the Cesium base layer.

capturePointerEvents.name: Capture Pointer Events
capturePointerEvents.description: Allow the Cesium canvas to receive mouse/touch input. Keep this disabled when Three.js controls should stay in charge.

enableLighting.name: Enable Globe Lighting
enableLighting.description: Use Cesium's terrain lighting model for day/night shading.

showAtmosphere.name: Show Atmosphere
showAtmosphere.description: Render Cesium sky atmosphere around the globe.

baseUrl.name: Asset Base URL
baseUrl.description: Public base URL used for Cesium workers, widgets, and assets.
